posts.author: erickgomxs (Erick Gomes de Oliveira)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello guys! Can someone help me?

I need to add files/images on my Item’s Uptades, but it shows the message “Adding files is restricted by the board owner”.
But I’m the board owner and the workspace owner.

image562×552 26.7 KB

I’ve already tried to see permissions, but is everything ok and i can’t upload files yet.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Erick!

This might be due to the account permissions that have been set if you’re on Enterprise

  • Account permissions

Screen Shot 2023-12-15 at 2.15.07 pm2124×1362 268 KB

.

If this might be the case, is it possible for you to check with the admins of your account?
